channel.title: Samba on Tech Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Samba on Tech Blog

item.title: Samba server en Linux
item.description:
sudo apt install samba -y
sudo systemctl stop smbd
mkdir linuxshare
vim /etc/samba/smb.conf

Agregá lo siguiente:

[global]
  server role = standalone server
  map to guest = bad user
  usershare allow guests = yes
  hosts allow = 192.168.0.0/16
  hosts deny = 0.0.0.0/0


[linuxsharename]
  comment = Open Linux Share
  path = /home/imlauer/linuxshare
  read only = no
  guest ok = yes
  force user = imlauer
  force group = imlauer

Ejecutá: testparm para probar la configuración.
